## Get (method)

**Location:** internal/store/store.go:29
**Signature:** `(key string) (string, error)`

Get returns the value for key, or ErrNotFound.

```go
29	func (s *Store) Get(key string) (string, error) {
30		s.mu.RLock()
31		defer s.mu.RUnlock()
32		v, ok := s.items[key]
33		if !ok {
34			return "", ErrNotFound
35		}
36		return v, nil
37	}
```
